frozen_protocol.planner_tie_break: sum channel top1-top2 margins, then lexical action
frozen_protocol.state_reconciliation: real observation room stack: novel push, prior rollback, same/no-room hold

label_sources.move_exit_count_after: counterfactual admissible_actions_after or next factual step
label_sources.room_relation: normalized next_obs room vs current/prior rooms

audit.task: multichannel action-conditioned real TextWorld event delta

experiment: E3-SG16 real TextWorld closed-loop candidate planner

research_hypothesis.epistemic_status: closed-loop mechanism on already observed fourth games
research_hypothesis.statement: A strict phase-isolated spike suffix memory can drive a real observation-corrected candidate planner with ANN-level task quality and lower training/response cost.
research_hypothesis.what_if: What if a recoverable spike suffix is a tiny cognitive map whose predicted deltas are sufficient for real-time action?

training.factorization: block Cholesky update of each Schur complement
